summary: Desktop release workflow built installers but did not attach platform binaries to GitHub Release assets.
impact: Release page for desktop-v0.1.0 only showed source archives, so users could not directly download Windows .exe or macOS .dmg installers.
fix: Updated .github/workflows/desktop-build.yml to trigger on desktop-v* tags and publish required Windows .exe and macOS .dmg artifacts to the release.
lessons: Tag-driven desktop release flows must explicitly upload required installer assets (.exe/.dmg) and fail when those files are missing.
